rules.title: Bar Keel Scantlings
rules.description: Minimum depth and thickness requirements for bar keels.

rules.title: Stem Scantlings and Diaphragms
rules.description: Cross-sectional area and thickness requirements for bar and plate stems, including horizontal diaphragm spacing.
conditions: Plate stems are to be supported by horizontal diaphragms spaced not more than 1.0 m apart.

variables.area: Cross sectional area of bar stem below summer load waterline [cm²]

variables.thickness: Thickness of plate stem below summer load waterline [mm]

rules.title: Stern Frames General Specifications
rules.description: General dimensional rules for fillets and web spacing on stern frames.
conditions: All fillets are to have adequate radii, not less than 50 to 75 mm.
Fabricated and cast steel sternframes must be strengthened by webs spaced not more than 700 mm apart.

rules.title: Propeller Post Scantlings (Forged, Fabricated, and Cast Steel)
rules.description: Scantling dimension formulas for different types of propeller posts and propeller boss.

rules.title: Sole Piece Section Modulus and Area
rules.description: Calculations for transverse and vertical bending modulus and sectional area of the sole piece.

rules.title: Shaft Brackets and Shell Plating Requirements
rules.description: Thickness, area, and section modulus for solid or built-up shaft brackets and adjoining shell plating.
conditions: Shell plating in way of shaft brackets must be >= 1.5 times the Rule bottom shell plating thickness amidships.

rules.title: Frame Spacing Limits
rules.description: Standard limits for transverse, longitudinal, and peak frame spacing.

variables.Peak Frame Spacing: Maximum spacing in aft and fore peaks [mm]

rules.title: Corrosion Additions
rules.description: Specific corrosion additions based on tank or hold type.
conditions: Ballast tank: tc = 1.5 mm
Cargo oil tank: tc = 1.5 mm
Hold of dry bulk cargo carriers: tc = 2.0 mm

rules.title: Plating and Stiffener Requirements
rules.description: Minimum thickness for plating and section modulus for stiffeners/girders subjected to lateral pressure.

rules.title: Bracket End Attachments
rules.description: Dimensional rules for unstiffened, flanged, and girder brackets.
conditions: The arm length of an unstiffened triangular end panel of a bracket is generally not to exceed 100 * t [mm].

rules.title: Longitudinal Strength Modulus and Bending Moments
rules.description: Requirements for critical buckling stress, still water, and wave bending moments.
conditions: Still water bending moments must be calculated for ships with unusual weight distribution or L >= 60 m.

variables.In: Moment of inertia of hull section [cm⁴]

rules.title: Openings and Hatchway Corners
rules.description: Rules for structural reinforcements around circular and streamlined openings.

variables.A: Sectional area for circular opening edge reinforcement (diameter >= 0.325m) [cm²]

variables.a: Transverse extension of curvature for streamlined shape [m]

rules.title: Design Pressure on Outer Bottom
rules.description: Calculates the design pressure on the outer bottom based on the zone and length of the ship.
conditions: Zone 1: T1 = T + 1.0 [m] for L > 60 [m]
Zone 1: T1 = T + 0.6 [m] for L < 20 [m]
Zone 2: T1 = T + 0.6 [m]
Zone 3: T1 = T + 0.3 [m]

rules.title: Design Pressure on Watertight Floors and Girders
rules.description: Calculates the design pressure on watertight floors and girders in double bottom tanks.

variables.h_p: Vertical distance from load point to top of air pipe [m]
variables.h_s: Vertical distance from load point to top of tank [m]

rules.title: Bottom and Inner Bottom Plating Thickness
rules.description: Determines the minimum thickness of the bottom and inner bottom plating.
conditions: Inner bottom thickness t >= 6.0 mm

rules.title: Single Bottom - Transverse Framing Section Modulus
rules.description: Section modulus requirement for plate floors fitted at every frame.

rules.title: Engine Seatings - Top Plate Area
rules.description: Recommended scantlings for engine girder face plate, web, and floors.
conditions: R > 1200 RPM

variables.R: RPM of engine at maximum power

rules.title: Side Shell Plating Thickness and Modulus
rules.description: Calculates the minimum thickness and modulus for side shell plating.

variables.Z: Section modulus of side shell longitudinals [cm³]

rules.title: Deck Pressures and Pillars
rules.description: Calculates design pressure on exposed decks, vehicle decks, and tubular pillars thickness.
conditions: Weather Deck p >= 5 kN/m²
Pillars d < 300 mm: t = 4.5 + 0.015 * d
Pillars d >= 300 mm: t = 0.03 * d

variables.h_o: Vertical distance from max load waterline to deck [m]

variables.n: Number of load areas per axle
variables.a: Extent of load area parallel to stiffener
variables.b: Extent of load area perpendicular to stiffener

rules.title: Watertight Bulkhead Loads and Thickness
rules.description: Calculates the design pressure and plating thickness for ordinary watertight bulkheads.

variables.h: Vertical distance from loadpoint to uppermost continuous deck [m]

rules.title: Bulwark Scantlings
rules.description: Section modulus at the bottom of the bulwark stay.
conditions: Bulwark plating thickness >= 4.0 mm

rules.title: Steel Hatchcover Plating
rules.description: Minimum thickness of steel hatch cover plating.
conditions: Thickness must be at least 3 mm

rules.title: Rudder Force, Torque, and Stock Diameter
rules.description: Formulas to determine dimensions and forces on the rudder system.
conditions: V is not to be taken as less than 6 knots
r = x_c - f

rules.title: Bow Anchors Total Mass
rules.description: Calculates the total mass of the bow anchors for cargo vessels.

rules.title: Piping Materials, Thickness, and Joints
rules.description: Rules for steel, copper, cast iron, and plastic pipes, including allowed temperatures and joint specifications.
conditions: Threaded Sleeve Joints: Nominal bore <= 25 mm : Max pressure = 1.2 N/mm², Max temperature <= 260°C
Threaded Sleeve Joints: 25 mm < Nominal bore <= 40 mm : Max pressure = 1.0 N/mm², Max temperature <= 260°C
Threaded Sleeve Joints: 80 mm < Nominal bore <= 100 mm : Max pressure = 0.7 N/mm², Max temperature <= 260°C
Pipe NDE Required: Outside diameter >= 101.6 mm
Post-Weld Heat Treatment: Pipe thickness > 30 mm OR Carbon content > 0.25%
Service temperature (Copper and Aluminum Brass) <= 200°C
Service temperature (Copper-Nickel) <= 300°C
Nodular/Spheroidal cast iron minimum elongation >= 12%
Grey cast iron = NOT PERMITTED for steam, fire, blowdown, fuel tanks, etc.
Plastic Pipes: Fluid/Environment temperature <= 60°C AND >= 0°C (NOT PERMITTED in safety-critical systems)
Hose bursting pressure >= 5 * Maximum working pressure
Pipe hydraulic test pressure >= 1.5 * Design pressure (Minimum >= 0.35 N/mm²)

variables.t_steel: Minimum thickness of straight steel pipe [mm]

variables.c: Corrosion allowance (0.8 mm for Cu/Al-Brass, 0.5 mm for Cu-Ni)

rules.title: Bilge, Fuel, and Cooling Systems
rules.description: Rules for valve operations, bilge pump capacities, branch lines, and fuel/oil system safety.
conditions: Valve Closing direction = Right-hand (Clockwise)
Vessel list <= 5 degrees for bilge drainage
Minimum allowable bilge pipe diameter >= 40 mm
Max suction lift (hand pumps) <= 7.3 m
Vent pipe cross-sectional area >= 1.25 * Filling pipe effective area
Fuel oil flash point >= 60°C (Emergency generator fuel >= 43°C)
Main engine output > 370 kW (500 shp) : Standby cooling/lube pump REQUIRED

rules.title: Shafts and Stern Tubes
rules.description: Formulas for shaft diameters, coupling dimensions, and stern tube bearing limits.
conditions: Coupling flange thickness >= 0.25 * Tailshaft diameter
Coupling fillet radius at base >= 0.08 * Shaft diameter
Water-lubricated bearing length >= 4 * Rule diameter
Oil-lubricated bearing length >= 2 * Rule diameter
Oil-lubricated bearing max pressure <= 0.8 N/mm²

rules.title: Pressure Vessel Classifications and Margins
rules.description: Temperature design margins and class definitions based on pressure/thickness.
conditions: Unheated parts : Design Temp = Max Fluid Temp
Heated by hot gases : Design Temp = Max Fluid Temp + 25°C
Combustion chambers : Design Temp = Max Fluid Temp + 50°C
Furnaces/Fire boxes : Design Temp = Max Fluid Temp + 90°C
Class 1 : Pressure > 3.5 bar OR Thickness > 38 mm
Class 2 : Pressure <= 3.5 bar AND (16 mm <= Thickness <= 38 mm)
Class 3 : Thickness <= 16 mm AND Material Temp <= 150°C

rules.title: Steering Gear Operational and Strength Limits
rules.description: Performance parameters and structural limits for manual and powered steering.
conditions: Rudder turn angle >= 35 degrees (on either side)
Fully powered turn rate >= 4 degrees / second
Manual max effort <= 16 kgf
Manual 1 complete handwheel turn >= 3 degrees of rudder angle
Powered gear REQUIRED IF : Rudder stock diameter > 150 mm
Secondary control engagement time <= 5 seconds
Combined equivalent stress in tillers/vanes <= 138 N/mm²

rules.title: Voltages, Emergency Power, and Wiring
rules.description: Electrical limits, emergency capacity, and general cable characteristics.
conditions: Power/Heating Max Voltage <= 500 V
Lighting/Cabins Max Voltage <= 250 V
Voltage drop from main busbars <= 6%
Emergency battery supply time >= 30 minutes
> 15 Amp circuits : Max points <= 1
<= 15 Amp circuits (24-55V) : Max points <= 10
<= 15 Amp circuits (110-127V) : Max points <= 14
<= 15 Amp circuits (220-250V) : Max points <= 18
Bending radius (small cables) >= 4 * Diameter
Bending radius (other cables) >= 6 * Diameter
Current rating multiplier (if > 6 cables bunched) = 0.85
Insulation resistance (at 500V DC) >= 1 Megaohm
Generator voltage regulation <= 2.5%
Parallel load sharing difference <= 15% of rated output

rules.title: Fire Alarms, Equipment, and Extinguishing Systems
rules.description: Detailed rules on escape dimensions, detector coverage, pump capacities, and fixed agent concentrations.
conditions: Engine/Boiler room escape routes >= 2
Escape trunk dimensions >= 0.6 m * 0.6 m
Heat Detector trigger temp >= 54°C AND <= 78°C (Max area <= 37 m²)
Smoke Detector trigger (visibility reduction) >= 2% AND <= 12.5% per meter (Max area <= 74 m²)
Fire pump capacity >= 10 m³/h
Hose length <= 18 m (Jet throw >= 12 m)
Portable extinguisher distance <= 10 m (walking distance)
Fixed CO2: Coverage >= 40% volume, Release <= 120s, Fill ratio <= 0.75 kg/l
Fixed HFC-227ea: Coverage >= 8% volume, Release <= 10s, Fill ratio <= 1.15 kg/l
Fixed IG-541: Coverage >= 44% AND <= 50% volume, Release <= 120s
Fixed FK-5-1-12: Coverage >= 4% (or 5.5% in special spaces), Release <= 10s, Fill ratio <= 1 kg/l
Water Mist/Sprinkler: Flow rate >= 5 liters/m²/minute, Duration >= 30 minutes

rules.title: Class Notations, Density, and Loading Pressures
rules.description: Rules for bulk carrier densities, angles of repose, cargo/flooding pressures, and single bottom floors.
conditions: Class 'Bulk Carrier' : Cargo density (rho_f) >= 0.8 t/m³
Class 'Bulk Carrier Strengthened for heavy cargoes' : Cargo density (rho_f) >= 1.0 t/m³
Light bulk cargo angle of repose (delta) <= 20°; Cement <= 25°; Heavy cargo <= 35°
C = 1.0 for inner bottom; C = Tan²(45 - delta/2) for vertical bulkheads
Angle of corrugation (webs with plane of bulkhead) >= 55 degrees

variables.h: Vertical distance from load point to deck at side [m]

variables.Z_leveled: Section modulus where cargo is leveled [cm³]
variables.l_e: Span of floors between longitudinal bulkheads [m]
variables.H: Height from load point to hatch coaming top [m]

variables.Z_heaps: Section modulus where cargo is loaded in heaps [cm³]

rules.title: Tanker Design, Capacities, Stability, and Ventilation
rules.description: Rules on cargo tank sizing, intact/damage stability constraints, and safety triggers for tankers.
conditions: Carriage temperature of liquid > 90°C : Thermal stress calculation REQUIRED
Length/Diameter ratio <= 7 for built-in cylindrical tanks
Service spaces below deck >= 20 changes of air per hour
Cargo pump room >= 30 changes of air per hour
Engine room max average temperature <= 40°C at 20°C ambient
Intact GZ >= 0.10 m (up to immersion)
Intact Area under GZ curve >= 0.024 m.rad
Intact GM >= 0.10 m
Longitudinal damage extent = 0.10 * L_oa (Minimum 5 m)
Transverse damage extent = 0.59 m (0.79 m for Type C/G)
Damage intermediate GZ >= 0.03 m, positive range >= 5 degrees
Damage final equilibrium heel <= 12 degrees
Level alarm device activation <= 90% filling
High level sensor for overflow protection <= 97.5% filling

variables.D_prime: Substituted depth for trunk deck vessels [m]

rules.title: Passenger Vessel Structure, Exits, and Safety Corridors
rules.description: Rules for bulkhead locations, watertight doors, exit counts, passage widths, and special notations (Ro-Ro, PRM).
conditions: Collision bulkhead distance from FP >= 0.04 * LWL AND <= 0.04 * LWL + 2.0 m
Aft-peak bulkhead distance from aft intersection >= 1.4 m AND <= 0.04 * LWL + 2.0 m (for L > 25m)
Watertight doors remote closure time >= 30 seconds AND <= 60 seconds
Rooms for >= 30 passengers OR >= 12 sleeping berths : Minimum exits >= 2
Clear width of exits/doors/stairs >= 0.8 m (Cabins >= 0.7 m)
Clear height of exits/corridors >= 2.0 m
Total sum of exit/stair widths (if > 80 passengers) >= 0.01 m * number of passengers
Length of dead ends <= 2.0 m
Clear width between handrails <= 1.80 m (if only access >= 1.0 m)
Fixed bulwark or guard rail height >= 1.0 m
Operating period of emergency power >= 60 minutes
Automatic start/takeover time (auxiliary generators) <= 30 seconds
Height of alarm triggers above floor >= 0.85 m AND <= 1.10 m (Max 10m apart)
Max total surface area of undivided passenger spaces <= 800 m²
Fire extinguisher distribution: 1 per 120 m² floor area, OR 1 per 10 cabins
Water supply pressure at hydrants >= 300 kPa (Jet length >= 6m)
Ro-Ro: Electrical equipment height >= 450 mm above deck, Ventilation >= 10 air changes/hour
PRM (Reduced Mobility): Exits/Stairs >= 0.9m, Corridors >= 1.3m, Stair gradient <= 33 degrees, Sills <= 0.025m

rules.title: Tug Design, Stability, and Towing Equipment
rules.description: Criteria for tug drafts, machinery casings, tow hook strength, stability under transverse forces, and bollard pull testing.
conditions: Design Draught (T) >= 0.90 * Moulded Depth (D)
Exposed machinery casings height >= 900 mm
Casing scantlings >= 1.20 * Exposed deckhouse scantlings
Distance from lower edge of side scuttles to waterline >= 750 mm
Breaking strength of towing hook >= 1.50 * Breaking strength of towline
Bollard Pull Test: Vessel steady course >= 10 min, Uniform pull >= 10 min
Certified continuous bollard pull <= 0.50 * Breaking strength of supplied towline

variables.GZ': Righting lever at deck immersion or 30° [m]
variables.l_v: Vertical distance from prop center to towline center [m]

rules.title: Barge Construction and Push/Tow Connections
rules.description: Rules for length calculation, hard chines, truss structures, and maximum stresses for towing elements.
conditions: Diameter of round chine bar >= 3 * Bottom plate thickness
Coefficient 'm' for bottom girders section modulus = 6
Coefficient 'm' for deck girders section modulus = 8
Cross-sectional area of diagonals ~= 0.50 * Area of adjacent stanchion

variables.L: Rule length of non-propelled vessel without rudder [m]
